name: PAY_GEOGRAPHY_INTERFACE
description: This interface table contains geography information from ORAMAST.txt file.

columns.Name: RECORD_TYPE
columns.Comments: For internal use only

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Code of the country to which the Geography belongs

columns.Name: AREA1
columns.Comments: State jurisdiction code

columns.Name: AREA2
columns.Comments: County jurisdiction code

columns.Name: AREA3
columns.Comments: City jurisdiction code

columns.Name: AREA4
columns.Comments: School District code

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start date from which this geography is valid for use.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date from which this geography is no longer valid.

columns.Name: CREATION_VERSION
columns.Comments: Column to record the file version of third party content provider in which this record was first introduced

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATION_VERSION
columns.Comments: Column to record the file version of third party content provider in which this record was last updated

columns.Name: GEOGRAPHY_SHORT_NAME
columns.Comments: Abbreviation for country or state based on whether this record is for a country or state

columns.Name: GEOGRAPHY_NAME
columns.Comments: Complete name of Geography

columns.Name: GEOGRAPHY_ID
columns.Comments: Unique geography identifier for geographies

columns.Name: START_RANGE
columns.Comments: Column for recording the lowest value in the zip code range

columns.Name: END_RANGE
columns.Comments: Column for recording the highest value in the zip code range

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Column to indicate whether this geography record is to be inserted or updated

columns.Name: IDENTIFIER_STATUS
columns.Comments: Column to indicate whether geocode and primary city geography identifier record is to be inserted or updated

columns.Name: GEO_DATA_PROVIDER
columns.Comments: Name of the data source provider

columns.Name: PROVIDER_GEO_ID
columns.Comments: Name of the provider ID

columns.Name: PARENT_PROVIDER_GEO_ID
columns.Comments: Name of the parent provider ID

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Name of the EXTERNAL_IDENTIFIER

columns.Name: PRIMARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicates whether the city and Township geography is primary geography

columns.Name: MULTIPLE_PARENT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether this geography has multiple parents.

columns.Name: FILE_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: File version of third party data source provider

columns.Name: FILE_VERSION_DATE
columns.Comments: File Version Date of third party data source provider

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Used to distinguish between English and French spellings for Canadian geographies.‘US’ and 'FRC' respectively indicate English and French  spellings of the geography.

indexes.Columns: RECORD_TYPE, LEGISLATION_CODE, AREA1, AREA2, AREA3, AREA4, START_DATE, END_DATE, GEOGRAPHY_NAME, START_RANGE, PROVIDER_GEO_ID, PARENT_PROVIDER_GEO_ID
